[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile webpage screenshot shows an anime title page with a header bar, a purple announcement strip, a content area with a cover image and rating details, buttons like “Favorite” and “Add to List,” and a centered popup message.

Main Subject:
The main focus is an anime listing page for “Vivy: Fluorite Eye's Song,” featuring a rectangular cover image on the left with an illustrated character and a large block of text on the right showing a star rating and other details, along with action buttons below the content.

Setting:
The image is a screenshot of a mobile website interface in portrait orientation, with a dark status bar at the top showing time and signal indicators. The webpage background is mostly light gray/white with colored header and banner sections.

Visual Details:
At the very top is a dark bar with the time “19:03” on the left and cellular/network indicators on the right, including “4G” and an “83” battery icon area. Below it is a blue header containing the text “MAIL” on the left, a small graphic in the center, and three controls on the right: an orange button labeled “Hide Ads,” an outlined button labeled “Sign Up,” a magnifying glass icon, and a hamburger menu icon. Under the header is a purple banner with white text: “Anime & Manga Challenges: A spooky summer of witches and exorcists awaits 👻,” plus an “x” close symbol on the right. The main content area has a light blue title strip reading “Vivy: Fluorite Eye's Song” and a smaller subtitle line “Vivy -Fluorite Eye's Song-.” On the left is a cover artwork image with blue and teal tones featuring an illustrated character and other figures/graphics. On the right of the cover image is a star icon followed by “8.37 (275,298 users)” and the line “Ranked #264,” then additional lines “TV (13eps)” and “Studios” with “Wit Studio” beneath it. Below these details are links/buttons including “More Information” with a right-pointing triangle icon. Further down, there is a button area: a gray button labeled “Favorite” on the left and a blue button labeled “Add to List” on the right with a plus icon. A popup box overlays the lower middle/right portion of the page, white with a shadow and a small black “x” at the top right of the popup. The popup contains the text “Get started,” followed by “Try making your own Anime List!” and “No sign up required.” Beneath the popup, the page shows a large blue button reading “Watch Episodes,” and some partially visible text on the left including “Synopsis” and “Read More” on the right, with a down arrow next to it. At the bottom is a dark edge of the phone screen.

Practical Summary:
The screenshot shows a mobile page for an anime entry titled “Vivy: Fluorite Eye's Song,” with rating and studio details next to a cover image. It also displays “Favorite” and “Add to List” controls, a popup encouraging users to create an anime list, and a “Watch Episodes” button.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
